title: koeleria macrantha subsp. helvetica
intro: Koeleria macrantha subsp. helvetica, also known as alpine June grass, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the grass family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of Koeleria macrantha subsp. helvetica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
